Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long VLO ranks #1 today with a score of 93.0, driven by exceptional long-term returns (354% over 10 years, 223% over 5 years) and all price levels trading above their 30/50/100/200-day moving averages. REX appears as the second entry with even more extreme 10-year performance (456% return) and stronger year-over-year outperformance versus SPY (107 points vs VLO's 64 points), though VLO edges ahead due to better ratio consistency across timeframes (5 ratio passes vs REX's 4). Both tickers show strong positive momentum signals in the "clean" category with normal volatility, suggesting sustained uptrends rather than risky spikes. Notably, both names significantly underperform QQQ over the past decade (VLO: -216%, REX: -114%), indicating their outperformance has been driven by factors outside tech and growth sectors—their top correlation with XLE (energy sector ETF at 0.73) explains this divergence from broader market momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
